title: Advanced Account Settings
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: Customize all default settings for your test setup by following these steps. **Prerequisites** - Recruiter license access **Steps** Accessing **Advanced Settings**: 1\. Click on the user icon in the top-right corner. 2\. Select **Settings** from the dropdown menu. 3\. Click on **Advanced Settings** in the left navigation pane. #### **Adjusting the Advanced Setting Options:** 1\. **Default Candidate Tags (Tests):** Specify candidate tags to identify candidates you invited. You can add more than one tag. 2\. **Default Template for Test Invites**: Add a default template for test invites. This template will be used for all invites you sent. 3\. **Default Invite Expiration Time:** Set the default invite expiration time for all your tests (applies to invites sent via the website or API key). 5\. **Default Test Reminder Time: ** Check the box to set a default reminder time for all candidates across all your tests. Only one reminder email will be sent per candidate. 6\. **Default Test Reminder Time**: Checking this box will unlock three options - **Invite with an expiration date:** If you have selected a valid expiry date for your test, you must specify this field. - **Invite without an expiration:** You must specify this field if your test has no expiry date. - **Reminder Email Contents:** Customize the text you would like the candidate to see **Note**: If you configure the email settings on the **Advanced Settings** page and the **Invite Candidates** page differently for a particular test, the settings configured on the **Invite Candidates** page will take precedence. \

title: Cancel Subscription Cancelling subscription
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: You can cancel your subscription if you no longer wish to use HackerRank for Work. # Cancelling subscription To cancel your subscription: 1.  Log in to **HackerRank for Work** using your credentials. 2.  Go to **Manage Subscription** from the profile dropdown. 3.  Click **Cancel Plan** under the **Current Plan** section. A confirmation window appears. 4.  Click **Cancel Subscription** to confirm. **Note:** You will retain access to your subscription until the end of the active billing cycle. \

title: Changing the Account Email
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: It is not possible for a user to change their account email. However, you can email support@hackerrank.com from the account that you want to change to request the primary email change. Once we verify that you have access to the email account, we can change the email address for you.

title: Email Notifications
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: You can adjust email notification preferences for your HackerRank account by following these steps: #### Accessing Email Notification Settings 1.  Click the **arrow** next to the user icon in the top-right corner of the home page. 2.  From the drop-down menu, select **Settings**, and then choose **Email Notifications** in the left navigation pane. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735206141671-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=KGEgLgkfJ9XHUN-sX8QjM6oqmlbEh0qd6gMpIXk3oCgM4dAzAKvLS1nKeh3-sEn2g0CqhTh1U-~jUcwS64WR-U6QOQkMbGO63oK9VO6KuiD8hXBQHb3XsmF-ZZVL51yNjpELQejITg2dC7xhhfDiC~04XDsEtPwBY3sHTLnZR8T1yzziKtVyoUaC3tKQjAn24W-XtTASK2KVeJ6irc9xdgiN1ywuHyYOxFW-tv1A6I7EN0MZuj1Izzk92KAa5ySocrLkQb638HZMsNwxhmIYvljjnOqyM1c068IP97dd5zjA6ae2HcY3tX1yJFvlE63vGwIQ~-jsA3f2N8lowDKY8w__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) #### Configuring Test Notifications - **Default Setting**: You will receive an email notification after a candidate completes a test. - **Custom Options**: - Disable notifications for test completions. - Enable notifications only if a candidate's score exceeds the cutoff score. **Tip**: Specify the cutoff score in a test's **Advanced Setting**. For details, refer to the [Modifying Score Settings for Tests](#) article. #### Configuring Interview Notifications - Enable or disable the option to send an email when an interview ends automatically.\ **Default**: Disabled. - Enable or disable the option to send an email if you provide feedback indicating a poor interview experience.\ **Default**: Enabled. This email helps collect additional details to improve your experience. #### Configuring Product Update Notifications - Enable or disable the option to receive product update emails.\ **Default**: Enabled. #### Finalizing Your Changes - Click **Save** to apply your preferences. \

title: HackerRank's Approach to Accessibility
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: At HackerRank, accessibility is an integral part of our software development process. We are committed to creating inclusive experiences that empower everyone to access and use our platform effortlessly. From the earliest design decisions to final testing, we ensure our products meet accessibility standards and provide a seamless user experience. We create products that work for everyone by identifying and addressing barriers early. ### **Proactive Testing and Audits** - **Regular Audits**: We conduct internal and external audits, ensuring alignment with accessibility standards. - **Tools and Technology**: We leverage tools like **Axe** for automated testing & **NVDA** and **Voiceover** for manual testing. ## **Prioritizing and Addressing Issues** Accessibility is an ongoing process. Issues are prioritized based on their impact, ensuring critical challenges are resolved first. - **Critical**: Block access to core functionality. This is resolved with the highest urgency. - **Serious**: Significantly hinder access but allow alternative paths. These are prioritized right after critical issues. - **Moderate and Low**: These cause minor inconveniences or fail technical criteria without affecting usability. We address these as part of our long-term roadmap. This approach ensures we address the most pressing needs while steadily improving our platform. ## **Third-Party Components** While we strive to address accessibility challenges proactively, we rely on certain third-party components for specific functionalities. Fixes for third-party components are often beyond our direct control, and hence, third-party components are excluded from our accessibility scope unless an accessible alternative is available. ## **Accommodation options** Limitations posed by third-party components or intricate technical constraints may prevent immediate resolution. In such cases, we provide in-product [accommodation options](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/360032485533-Adding-Extra-Time-for-Candidates#:~:text=The%20Time%20Accommodation%20button%20is,reflected%20in%20the%20invite%20template) and dedicated support to ensure users can effectively achieve their objectives. ## **Commitment to Continuous Improvement** We continuously evaluate and refine our processes to align with evolving accessibility standards and user needs. - Through each audit and review cycle, we identify areas for improvement, address potential gaps, and enhance usability. - By investing in tools, training, and internal processes, we prioritize accessibility in our continuously evolving products. \ For inquiries or to access our latest Accessibility Conformance Reports, please contact us at [accessibility@hackerrank.com](mailto:accessibility@hackerrank.com). \ \

title: Manage Billing Updating credit card information Updating billing address Downloading an invoice
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: The **Billing** section in HackerRank for Work allows administrators to update payment methods and billing information, and download invoices. # Updating credit card information You can update your payment method to prevent service disruptions caused by expired or outdated card details. To update your credit card: 1.  Log in to **HackerRank for Work** using your credentials. 2.  Go to **Manage Subscription** from the profile drop-down. 3.  Click **Update** under the **Payment Method** section. 4.  Enter your updated card information: - Card number - Expiration date - Security code - Country 5.  Click **Add** to save your changes. **Note:** All payment information is securely processed via Stripe. # Updating billing address Ensure your billing address is accurate to maintain proper invoicing and tax records. To update your billing address: 1.  Log in to **HackerRank for Work** using your credentials. 2.  Go to **Manage Subscription** from the profile drop-down. 3.  Click **Update Billing** under the **Billing Address** section. 4.  Enter your new address: - Street Address - City - State/Region/Province - Postal Code - Country 5.  (Optional) Select the checkbox to apply the same address as your shipping address. 6.  Click **Save** to confirm. # Downloading an invoice You can download invoices for accounting and recordkeeping purposes. To download an invoice: 1.  Log in to **HackerRank for Work** using your credentials. 2.  Go to **Manage Subscription** from the profile drop-down. 3.  Scroll to the **Order History** section. 4.  Locate the invoice you want to download. 5.  Click the download icon (⤓) in the **Receipt** column. **Note:** If an invoice is missing, contact [support@hackerrank.com](mailto:support@hackerrank.com). \

title: Pause Subscription
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: The **Pause Subscription** feature allows individual self-serve plan subscribers to temporarily pause their HackerRank subscription instead of canceling it. This feature enables you to resume your subscription whenever needed, ensuring flexibility and uninterrupted access when required. ### Prerequisites To use the **Pause Subscription** feature, ensure the following conditions are met: 1.  You must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago. - This includes accounts in a renewal grace period (7 days) due to a late recurring payment. 2.  You must have a **monthly subscription** for one of the following plans: - Individual Monthly - Basic - Interview Monthly ### How to Pause Your Subscription Follow these steps to pause your subscription: - **Access Subscription Settings** - Click on the **profile icon** in the top-right corner of the page and select **Settings** from the dropdown menu. - Navigate to the **Billing** section under **Subscription**. ![mceclip0.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204522902-1734046450926--e2b3523e-4764-4305-a8ec-b633652a6be1?Expires=253370764800&Signature=KV0vI1E72eXd8zmjMmAxMJ2jSHnr47Is5sds28iD3GpUVf0re6AAQME2yZ1Dz~nGQAdrmuVaTFYqEZSyoqEBk-5GBlM3GdKNehZVltkBGPBBCYvGruRumncpeCdUSy7cOSVDULg51X7m-5cOwwuhJqriWLLfHn1kdGIn3mP5LUceYGHtoZ36eOnbRk2Yrf0GmlD2Vr2AC4G1PpuzNzRFY3366W4MOA8WFA8~AJ8ZP-IpQ5A4Tw3RYexwFnzXdvtXFAFppr15PZD0sAXZrIC8OtWis~kwAyQ6iFUBwbsxlASOJ8CSkS7HpbeQu00~zARepviIrIyrKFsAVWEaoH8VKQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) - **Initiate Pause Subscription** - Click the **Cancel Plan** button. The UI will display a prompt about the new **Pause Subscription** feature. ![mceclip1.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204594500-1734046451310--866c5ba7-ff6f-4caa-b988-81a10f550230?Expires=253370764800&Signature=as8xLYCyLext-DKmtcvXP3fxuBK6gS-TIQMHekaPZosGYBpLOLdxbRYCzOk9r~SGEhDprqoog92YOrrSQscK2UsbBfLEHJbHjSQJEs31t4AWh63Npp2JSEtpgqI3fF2Si2VYZFVDZtumPBqW6NFz6GJg75fOAlQ1QpoTyLzwX2WV1SMGEbPAyLY3nRH2NcMf7Q8rSQAfP93hJmVc27L~NNXZcTiBsh8GCaucAiriy99HN08jeKsBzgbBbtNh4NVJksXcpt28L-6yy9HPbKghLo7qyB7SXhSEWk8g4JT0qqnlqMjQbD12nB13GZDDKM8nvl4DlxVavuTUhyReRySDaw__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) - Select the desired pause duration: - Minimum: **1 month** - Maximum: **12 months** ![mceclip2.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204607902-1734046451740--a352e7b2-dee6-4e9d-8d00-d14cff821580?Expires=253370764800&Signature=QWxwujBCaWzp6SnvJtn76OflxBcHuRW24LhnnF29J2lQ-2W0RtMuKqfiApOBmd2wcqmI7Ko5uKNuoV5kwojytPjLfvXPz6~~nt7GXEBknj61WobxMUl3hRnii~c37lC86j3lYIDqWy9y9rSZksEoRHx8g6DepxgK-K-PaMr4tuJ~2UmgU-Yv5NhPbDj8LMOeuSZ-IXuJKS4QZ0ml-ZdvL7bYCIq8HTdmlB0wvR60SohsKpXiilgM5PFW9tD1s70fPEmC4mtWofU3ELYf-z3eF~iuacaz6ajsFiCN4hzg~IWCpQrkb0zjxZTvwPcDYMNctC2Jrp3BKpUV2-Z1Ofq9QQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) - **Confirm Pause** - Click **Confirm Pause**. A confirmation message will appear, displaying the pause duration and the automatic resume date. ### Resuming Your Subscription If you attempt to log in during the paused period, you cannot access your HackerRank account. A popup notification will inform you of the status of the pause. ![mceclip3.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204625356-1734046452141--20fd5b6f-27d9-473f-954d-5bb6cf56ad5f?Expires=253370764800&Signature=cIxTpe0aiLvY5Q5VoR-m-Glf4sSgZTSAcNblpmtXUMS~7yHejs8LvGUIU8xUQOrQnKQZcHnVbCVHECJnxkgDaIG-qKZM03Hbf08tQV1-mE4pJXnlLvRnJTGO9F00FB8K4WvPTMEPFwmDywWB92DUNAT2G~3PXBKA~CoxKSY4j-isQIhwjSrtxu9mywzBp8JztSD5SLS-Lp~JG65dq14tO99qYJQaujeHq1MWguj10VraX4rVFHS7q9cmC~gnxwvU8TSQ1VmWJOklnaouDLsGPuCCxT8S9o1W5bhdysVqOUTrRghhiuqBopH~FcV6dQV~Y9PY6wpnRWjVeTHI8SpbCg__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) To resume your subscription: - Click **Resume Early** to visit the **Billing** page. ![mceclip6.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204643123-1734046452537--50bcabfc-4467-4253-b16e-fbffbbe72d60?Expires=253370764800&Signature=Qz3JVSuSbhyeJpJaOl0EJp1KWmUVKdumwwssP3STSnGyyHm6A7XlHobET-UxtIr-E1nMl0gl0MDxq5bRHr6Fps6e3aMUggpgNQWo5ujRBnZ2E4ZcjWno~fAI-v-Ya06C1nXwB1UpYaPLUBYZQYpaTk936uBJCvUjyTboYtt2xntqb4NvJmQkVp8yfs3VkJPfIKCN2Dexdo-z5yI3OHinQ9I4hOtvgt-Jw75~1GYQK1vPoMRYLqyNT3lnRfOaJDPhul3nMEm584Tn4JCU2D3umGw-gY6U6sMvSF8RosZjrO0ABmEOoyORwLnI0HYYuQ6H20JtE83DBcXm5lSLAmRSLQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) - On the billing page, click **Resume Plan**. ![mceclip8.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204654279-1734046452967--95a9a1bf-d33d-4a18-bdd4-e8d831ba0126?Expires=253370764800&Signature=nw43KsqtY2772oKqr7UTQoVWwF-AgDoGEh0vYeL--UUSgdYqgqv0ZwYunkK9ml~Nfuk3F4Bup9qH2EK75UKXZzCPGPBaQirqLqkFC82OVRtwZjZLqTJhHmzAG4hMnKgAw-w0WIjl6zekHsYd34QodDcopsxZB6yzsSXUX1maZqLsHmoUrl3aNl0XnjRGwxnwQlgamBpdoJ1w4WX4-Nz-nRN2qaJYlA-9bfkNWVFuZUk9NYkyTK7thl-3bhiLRUpg3DuRRLPYxSijun6TgF0GFv14gFyDa091OlRq8vbLc8tj0gczp642fd6UKfXuXMhJ71x9kgnUxg-bXp8HoDs~Zw__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) - Confirm your selection in the popup by clicking **Confirm**. ![mceclip7.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204685018-1734046453519--e068c371-a36e-4648-a381-a722d8f7aab6?Expires=253370764800&Signature=GuZAa662b1jMt44J4bFA-W0AG9Pi86tRzIFSSjfkzHaMo0lGwOBjuqijIZc1HpiWZiH7T~8gKBrtg3Vwjua7EFlWnNBwaOoP4Z53tuVO-iD7p3hwregkxzujMsVBxc7JvWZaSvVoduvj0do--xZ5OE3n7ejOebgmD6iFsHkgsOamC7Fs4ldqRHS6hsbNt1jL8H6CK9UaTjULo3p4qNFMNePFUhfrwshQNopBv-Iu3oMnkvPIjHjvB5oRtlEMEE6qAJQp2DpHRCD2C-w54v4-luqhtotdqCHF5vcg7E5ctzjs046ORTP4d-URkUugI~yiTx~Sl1W1YoeBZD3fsB3q3g__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) - You will receive a notification confirming that your subscription has resumed and your account is active. ![mceclip11.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204706297-1734046453872--24d36f01-5207-4fec-bfdc-01308acf9a91?Expires=253370764800&Signature=iHLbBxLV532Q4gCk7toycY2jguMjfkxinTmqV-pIPZ-9RrnYVSnMc9gFYuf4Zv64tSXCh8GsgLE6iRMM3aVdPFEKxM5E4RL6RB0giPGsIyDOxb~gL411ukuVebpWrFO-jwrB1p1TMgiyXZftOBoV24TF3y~F84F2zgTTbfOigmkPJhy0l8riPGJDL~9ztvDlv9jNDkPq6GefpDf-I8Fddfo~n3j7-DeXSa7HwrOkO7YBRK8sW-lNsD5Ub~Gn8e6wOswtRLkp8w5yYpbRoieKCKjwStvRLQDEHekN0lyCFG4HdMQlqy-n8FY4YwJm6n3okDe6yqkKFsG941U7iRv13Q__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) ### Extending the Pause Period You can extend the pause period even during an active pause. - Navigate to the **Billing** page and click the **Cancel Subscription** button. ![mceclip9.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204725125-1734046454221--78707721-ef4c-45e3-be69-14924f22dcff?Expires=253370764800&Signature=DwtbVSiiM2fUn8xOkCeMwlfDkvlrnNPRh2ulZJTNb2DmSPneKCc3wx2gIKN~J3152jKUmcTj1fS4Y203j-VbkxS-dmqIWb0zuOB4c3NyvlXWYtLbrMuTAfUTmo6T77uZei1byiexI7R998D9E3DspFwsQqOtGZNBoYUU~egDGwjBi7wa7E6GA~eKajoX7jpb4Mx6C~cB1Z6M-c41KEG4bZQkRdtnjftpqUZsQ2LSa0EKv~wu~gEd7S7xp8XQXtU6OWrdB~K0KObanx8cJ4GC4gN3DYnp1gTMaeB2rwkCS1T9ZbUXHfdwFCzu623pzyuoBELTz2hPKILQquxkrjWEwQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) - In the popup, select **Extend Pause**. - Choose the new pause duration and click **Confirm Extension**. ![mceclip10.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735204751076-1734046454676--63224f3e-f423-4069-b261-83636b81ecfe?Expires=253370764800&Signature=omWzoI2HyuwUQaeL2gB7q7LGjeeqIXbdv3M8A5Lr7MZZct6mAwF5dWS2-8hILASe2L4p36OCmr2stPM38Fkqt5G6pBJtWu9yF4RNQ38BBxP6E4P7GOWxqIMcHXOCkMagXRCM5nG1gDB1NRiq3KkUpYugZkDx2C6Tq~ApTGF3JWLTv4kyzSd6sqswaby6hFE~OtyKBbP590JUJJ0M-5LYj5XiHqL56BgaCAkPIqx4YkiAhe~Ta5u3npUlEYeg-D0Rn4sjy-7Ltx5anioxLW5dI~B1xLwiB8kjc3p~UEBMHa3HLKXpAP3bm32jN1nnotRwRWf~NStz6-CJL~1DOVF5yQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) \

title: Report Settings
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: You can set up or change your preferences for the Microsoft Excel CSV reports generated for the candidates. These reports can be downloaded from the Test Reports page. The preferences you set here are reflected in the Microsoft Excel CSV reports you downloaded from the HackerRank platform. ## Accessing Report Settings - On the top right corner of your HackerRank account home page, you can access Settings. - You can find the Report Settings placed on the left pane under User settings on the settings page. ## Components of Report Settings Report settings are divided into six sections, each with fields you can select or unselect by ticking the check box attached to it. ### Candidate In this section, you can select the candidate fields you want to include in your report sheets, such as their Email, ID, Name, Tag, and IP Address. ### Company This section allows you to include your Company ID and Company Name in your reports. ### Test There are several fields in the Test section. The definitions of each field are given in the table below to help you better understand when choosing an option. |  |  | |----|----| | **Term ** | **Definition** | | Invite ID | Invitation ID is generated while inviting a Candidate.  | | Invite Method | Method of Invitation  | | Invite Valid From | The date and time from which the Invitation allowed the candidate to take part in a test. | | Invite Valid To | The date and time when the Invitation gets invalid.  | | Invited At | Time of the Invitation | | Invited By Email | Email of the recruiter who invited the Candidate.  | | Invited By Name | Name of the recruiter who invited the Candidate.  | | Role | the test is created for.   | | Test Duration | The duration set for the Test.  | | Test ID | The ID of the particular Test.  | | Test Name | Name given to the Test | | Test Owner Email | Email of the Test creator.  | | Test Owner Name | Creator of the Test. | | Test Tags | Tags given for the Test.  | ### Attempt Settings The definition of each field related to a candidate’s attempt has been given in the table below. |  |  | |----|----| | **Term** | **Definition** | | Attempt Count | The number of attempts made by the candidate.   | | Attempt Endtime | Ending time of the candidate’s attempt.   | | Attempt ID | The ID of the candidate’s attempt | | Attempt Plagiarism | Plagiarism in Attempt | | Attempt Start time | Start time of the Candidate’s attempt. | | Attempt Time Taken | Time taken to finish a test.  | | Cutoff Score | The cutoff score of the test taken by the candidate.  | | Detailed Report Url | Url to access the detailed report of the candidate’s attempt.  | | Feedback Comments | Feedback comments given by the candidate at the end of the test.  | | Last Attempt Date And Time | Candidate’s last attempt date and time.  | | Max Score | The maximum score attained by the candidate  | | Network Disconnected Duration | Duration of the time when candidate lost their network | | Number Of Window Exits | The number of times the candidate moved away from the test window. | | Out Of Window Duration | Duration the candidate spent away from the test window.  | | Percentage Score | Percentage of the score attained by the candidate.  | | Proctor Flag | Flags raised by the HackerRank proctoring system. | | Proctor Flag Reasons | Reasons behind a candidate getting the proctoring flags.   | | Product Rating | Rating given by the candidate at the end of the test.  | | Score | The final score attained by the candidate.  | | Status | Status of the candidate’s attempt | ### Team |            |                                  | |------------|----------------------------------| | **Term **  | **Definition**                   | | Department | Department of the hiring team.   | | Region     | Region of the hiring team.       | | Team       | Hiring team.                     | | Owner      | Owner of the hiring team.        | ### Attempt Result |  |  | |----|----| | **Term** | **Definition** | | Candidate Detail Answer | Detailed Answers given by the candidate in their attempt.  | | Code Language | Code language the candidate used to answer the question.  | | Compile And Test | Compilation and Test of the code written by the candidate.  | | Copy Paste Frequency | The number of times the candidate copy-pasted something in the code editor. | | Lines Of Code | The number of code lines written by the candidate.  | | Mcq Answer | Multiple choice question answer | | Plagiarism Link | Link to the webpage from where the candidate plagiarised the answer | | Plagiarism Percent | Percentage of the plagiarised answer in the candidate’s attempt. | | Question Answered | Status of the question in a test, whether answered or not.  | | Question Plagiarism | If a question is plagiarized in the test. | | Question Score | The score attained for a question in the test.  | | Question Type Score | The score attained by the candidate for each question type.  | | Section Score | The score attained by the candidate for a particular section in a test. | | Skill Score | The score attained by the candidate for a particular skill in the test.  | | Subjective Answer | The answer of the subjective questions.  | | Tag Score | The score attained by the candidate for a tag attached to the test.  | | Test Case Is Passed | The candidate’s answer passes the test case attached to a question. | | Test Case Memory | Versions of the test case results were saved in the attempt. | | Test Case Time | Time is taken by the candidate to pass a test case. | | Time Taken Per Question | Time taken by the candidate to answer each question. |

title: Safelist/Allowlist URLs and IP Addresses for HackerRank Affected areas Allowlist URLs Allowlist IP addresses
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: When you create questions or answer tests, you may encounter errors caused by blocked domains. The HackerRank platform notifies you of blocked domains in the IDE and identifies the ones you must safelist to ensure seamless interaction across various features. # Affected areas The IDE displays the notification for the blocked domains in the following areas: ## Screen When you access blocked domains through the screen functionality in the IDE, you receive a notification that specifies the domain you need to safelist. ## Question creation When you create questions and attempt to include content from a blocked domain, a notification appears to alert you to the domain that requires safelisting. ## Reports When you generate or access reports in the IDE, any blocked domains referenced in the report content trigger a notification.\ The notification displays the blocked domains, making it easy to determine which ones you must safelist for uninterrupted access and functionality in the IDE. The notification displays the blocked domains, making it easy to determine which ones you must safelist for uninterrupted access and functionality in the IDE. # Allowlist URLs The table below lists the URLs and endpoints you must safelist to ensure proper connection with HackerRank for Work. title: Time Zone Settings
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: ## Overview You can change your time zone settings to reflect the time zone in which you are located. By default, HackerRank selects the time zone based on your location while creating the account. This article will walk you through the steps in modifying the Time Zone settings. ## Modifying the Time Zone Settings 1.  Click on the arrow next to the user icon on the top right corner of the home page. 2.  Click on the **Settings** option from the drop-down menu that appears. ![Settings](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1734046605066-?Expires=253370764800&Signature=nIIQCBZFm2B9RLCtYAePWshMp2QBamv269Yj32n6P-kd~i36VCojGQLkTUX9YzQw72OiIQiWkAaWkROZPsrlhVi~eeV~eR6mGHOMq8XeIn-hPH1EQKW4GInOz9DoHGt8MYs8p9SwEhyaThP3Yy6ATbvsPKh0KfldPfvmvJohIfcqTRWlZHBaPFpVIrXJ9V9GTkA1KEFbm8MSPX6zQUCnvZbR67rIzu6R3FACFF4eEsP-lhbYEEUE1gADDIGXMu3HLQ6ZiEj1Ptkp3EDrvb9LTgBlT4o3gq-LS6RQGIHCZ6dOsCe-WSBd93fTOLAWgfSKeBI17kDPI2DcdO-e0jv4Xw__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) *Accessing HackerRank account settings* 1.  Under the **User** settings click on the **Profile** option, scroll down to **Your Time Zone** section and select the required time zone. ![Time](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1734046605492-?Expires=253370764800&Signature=YYhfqFZlCqM8iwPrTFOPq~91~XseruLwon5mbsU3F6FtK93sOjevVGAzFtraz50Rx3rYSaKfWaQ-UqygPV2afCxfWN-tGpV679pMZZylmRVqF6WEEEPpCHWf33SAjs4ryqYg6TwNJ0hfmna6bMdjycuu08IMyu3U6pPbuKCDUNoxtPROlaowba~V11qw7MK72waddr7L7ubZNbjnm13NBeIYcawAFzUuWQNVKe4Hz5U9F6NuHLELlfdagzF6d0gPx88frUOYyWIBqSOcv7RltVJaNY7UF3E7iMtNkEMF206t-XL8jEX5lxVZOl2NQfkDDDpT~Kb-zDN3-l3kmFo1qg__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) *Setting a time-zone* 1.  Click on the **Save** button to save the time zone you have selected. \

title: Update or Reset Password Updating password Resetting password
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: You can change your password at any time to keep your account secure. Use a combination of letters, numbers, and special characters for added security. # Updating password To update a password: 1.  Log in to **HackerRank for Work** using your credentials. 2.  Select your profile icon in the upper-right corner. 3.  Select **Settings** from the drop-down menu. 4.  In the **Change Password** section, enter your current password, new password, and retype your new password to confirm. 5.  Click **Save**. **Note:** If you forget your current password, use the **Forgot Password** option on the login page to reset it. # Resetting password To reset a forgotten password: 1.  Go to the [HackerRank for Work](https://www.hackerrank.com/work/login) login page. 2.  Click **Forgot Password?** under the password field. 3.  Enter the work email address associated with your account. 4.  Click **Next**. 5.  Check your email for a password reset link from HackerRank. 6.  Follow the instructions in the email to create a new password. \

title: Updating Personal Information of your Account
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: You can change the basic information about your HackerRank for Work account, including your name, contact number, country, time zone, and display name. Follow the steps below to understand how to update the basic information on your HackerRank for Work account. ## Steps to Update Personal Information 1.  Click on the arrow next to the user icon on the top right corner of the home page and select **Settings**. 2.  Click on **Profile** to update your **Personal Info**. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1735202490000-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=jBjIWfGzXehctVFDgkTAm-yUtG1iOPSUhIUVtDsG5cTJ7zDf0jxupzli39ukhkWyHDvRCm9ouF15ym~5Qu4hj7YRzCuVwZ5dkeohTgYl0BK~Wp5OkvJ6CyhCmCB7lQI9a7oFawbeWfIOX64F7ncZ43dAO1-DRfQ7TQ0ZKB3Rmll5yK5drE52QZwFEzvJGAPkP52hzyqiPafcwQC-qpr-8Akpjy9bCxmbk5-zgfDBDbvWccGjWB54uSfbj97b2jMAAMyPRijwj-jfg0Fal5EFmJGo6H2I74dY3QlJSpUIr9NtnlCSr~~7vlUDkGR6SKC9BnRQhsgU~H3tkSZhSwsvQQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) **Note:** If you must update your email address, contact support at [support@hackerrank.com](mailto:support@hackerrank.com). \

title: Upgrade Plan Upgrading plan
category: Settings / User Account Settings and Preferences
content: You can upgrade your plan if your current subscription no longer meets your needs. # Upgrading plan To upgrade plan: 1.  Log in to **HackerRank for Work** using your credentials. 2.  Go to **Settings** from the profile drop-down. 3.  Select **Change Plan** in the **Subscription** section. 4.  Browse the available plans and select the one that fits your requirements. 5.  Follow the prompts to complete the upgrade. **Note:** Plan upgrades take effect immediately, and charges are prorated accordingly. You can also upgrade your plan from the **Billing** page by clicking **View Other Plans** under **Current Plan**. \ \

title: Accessing SkillUp Employer Platform
content: The SkillUp platform for employers consolidates skill-level data in a single portal. To access: 1.  Log in to your HackerRank account. 2.  Navigate to the top menu and click on **Hire**. 3.  Select **SkillUp** from the dropdown menu. The platform consists of two main pages: **Overview** and **Talent**. ## Overview Page This section provides a graphical representation of your organization’s certified roles and skills. ### Key Components - **Company Overview**: Displays metrics for certified developers, assessed developers, and onboarded managers. It also tracks certifications and skill badges earned within your organization. - **Role Certification Funnel**: Click on a role to see a detailed breakdown of employee certifications with the ability to download the data. - **Certification Trends**: View certification trends over time, filtered by specific roles or periods. - **Engagement and Assessment Trends**: View engagement and Assessment trends over time, filtered by certifications and badges. - **Track Developer Actions:** On the Developers Onboqarded dashboard, you can track the details such as: - Number of developers invited - Number of developers signed up - Number of developers attempted to get a badge or certification - Number of developers who completed a badge or certification ![Overview Page SkillUp.gif](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1742288486731-OverviewPageSkillUp.gif?Expires=253370764800&Signature=CZofqdvPDD7UCB2rI38mBkw4VsXzKOg8IlNPiMhFEJBhiJVwzFASOrOcsrtBvn~XJ-3Rrg11dslYTtFHqgFili9vvFvfClw15-ZSO4cl2UtJcHjz0k43zKHc-jKJkE5v~fH6BnyCSGVvd9TLPczArJHxhD5A5XZq74ybvVY7JgZMGJxj~tzilv2EjaJjGghptztvqLtXUWYi4VJBrt42JWayUlx80HIwQzOTEB2uccWSF6Xgpw7mMzbs0Jv3izwiOqVb2b37Rl0Xjfr4PpMswO0y47sXm65ayst~LhlK7VJ5doZ3v1x3TVkv60jSmNixAayngtEQt3OIXxlNMkMEuA__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) ## Talent Directory The Talent directory helps organize your developers based on **Designation**, **Certifications**, and **Skills Proficiency**. ### Features - Use filters to narrow down employees by **Job Titles**, **Certifications**, **Skills**, or **Managers**. - Click the **Export **button to export the data. The exported reports have clear formatting, helping you quickly find the assigned and overdue assignments. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1742554533126-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=ssCqxr34t1iQTlsNKjj2fZsC9FsT95wo9RkIhyk7OeuXEIW9Agl6hmAGkl4HydPbraFCF1Wcgj7r7zP-gr~Ec0-S6fEulAcg2ywtZenNoh45TpQSsDNwhZ18TBk2MVcQBFAjHp11dkE9BQ56AZHoRa5CXGXsfSQjVDvLVhHeZes~frCpgyc2Wr1K7~aK74OKogOSALUrrHvIe2bV62pod8Qar6DTgiPCXOU312PuDMew3XHOYwKp8guvCF14nxp0MPxp7jO-MAHYqxwsB79XEMjMJEVcZi~5gq4fl2Le5rwEtwvjKPylQxukHYQ1ghK83z-Z3~HCisQjTR4TjxW6jw__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) - Select any employee to invite them to a certification or skill badge test. ## My Team Dashboard Managers can access the **My Team** dashboard to review their team's progress. The dashboard consists of two tabs: - **Direct Reports**: Displays data of team members who directly report to you. - **All Reports**: Displays data of all employees within your department beyond your direct reports. ### Search and Export Data - Use the search bar to find employees. The filters will help refine the search based on skills, activities, and managers. - To download all of the employee data, click on the **Export** option. ### Track Employee Progress Click on the employee's name to view their progress. The slider highlights all the certifications self-assigned or assigned by the employer. You can click on the certification name to expand the timeline of events. Further, you can send reminders and a due date for the certification. **Note:** You cannot send reminders or set a due date for the self-assigned certifications. ## User Management The User Management section provides access to all users within your organization. To access: 1.  Click the profile icon. 2.  Select **User Management**. You can filter users and add new ones by clicking **Add New Users**. There are two types of users: - **Individual Users**: Developers in your organization with SkillUp accounts. They can access the platform to earn skill badges and certifications. - **Organizational Users**: Admins or managers who oversee teams of developers. You can modify user roles by clicking the three dots next to a user’s name and selecting **Modify User Role**. ### Inviting Employees for Certification or Badge You can invite the employees/team members to take new certifications or badges. To invite an Employee: 1.  Select an Employee from the dashboard. 2.  Click **Invite to Badge/Certification**. 3.  Choose the certification or badge in the pop-up window and set the due date. 4.  Customize the email content if needed and send it to the selected Employees. \

title: Audit Logs in SkillUp How to request audit logs
content: Audit Logs provide a detailed record of organizational activity in SkillUp. Organizations can use audit logs to support governance, security monitoring, and compliance requirements. Audit logs capture key events performed within SkillUp, including: - User additions, removals, and role changes - Badge, certification, and assignment-related actions - Administrative configuration changes The information included in an audit log varies based on the request and the selected time period. # How to request audit logs To request audit logs, contact the SkillUp Support team at [skillup-support@hackerrank.com](mailto:skillup-support@hackerrank.com). **Note:** Only administrators can request audit logs for a SkillUp account. This restriction ensures that only authorized users can access organization-wide data. ## Sample template You can use the following template to request audit logs: ***Subject:*** *Request for SkillUp audit logs* \ *Hello SkillUp Support Team,* *I am requesting Audit Logs for our organization’s SkillUp account to support internal audit and compliance requirements.* *Request details:* - *Organization name: \[Your organization name\]* - *Requested time period: \[start date – end date\]* - *Relevant event types (if applicable): \[Categories of events to include. For example, user authentication, administrative actions, or assignments\]* *Thank you for your assistance.* *Kind regards,\ \[Your full name\]\ \[Your role/title\]\ \[Your organization\]\ \[Work email address\]* **Note:** If you have questions about audit logs or are unsure what information to provide, contact [skillup-support@hackerrank.com](mailto:skillup-support@hackerrank.com). \ \

title: Create Custom Certifications Prerequisite Creating custom certifications
content: Custom Certifications let you convert a HackerRank for Work test into a SkillUp certification experience. This allows you to create certifications that align with your organization’s learning and skill validation requirements. # Prerequisite You have created a test in your HackerRank for Work account. # Creating custom certifications To create custom certifications: 1.  Log in to your **SkillUp** account using your credentials. 2.  Go to **Certify \> Manage Custom Certifications**. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1776693111699-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=BgJ0aVe6i~NRO7EhU9pOXLAUy4xX5LaEWVwM-hYBro4tHoQ2VM2kYAzNsOXtmFfa3Ux2WGbVTZegvdL-l~bs7KE4Wl7Rjc6cL-qYeZ64xdALXcXT097i0plj5u7upze-~VRjGLl6rHClR-0f3DbvbgMeRIw8jrd-Z3pAusPoOAtwe940hiKbLpjnzZSKSqzfV4~bHSTZ5BNn8tSGXhAJps5ElGEQFTcZvjdbQFpX3I~dXzb-TS2mveAXPM4x55NnKI-hjVUZGuyt4pJrmvYjQi3e8Neb2h3WJkGzG3WSwfDEC9Lm2p7dD3qJy-MsCXWvBb6TyfqO5MCFwdIT4wLyTQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) 3.  Click **New Custom Certification**. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1776693130913-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=CKvCdjXtuC7k6sLOWAY4TjuQ01uFsZGpoq4ZLwWGCm2TBe1i7sQYImckDJMuuesClJZlKJTjvmlkVP0JXrjKUT7olNb0qt5qOU1ceBG9vtzx~puPI918-7jM34QlXVnSbU9kuvRzpP2AGTDAwENi1Gq7XpLKloLNpOc-cmVmYia3-dUlsvjEgjCcgYannQ0xhVASAnWCJcIMZEV-lu-dGe3kasRelSfOEekzcbBaQGdbJoMSJ0lb17GBKweyhga0gUir69um8VDFNZL9PURaNP84e3pxvKd-FiDdj0OUk3etuKBxVo2D4F1g6DZ147P5ANGRtOep158t9z64Vdl48Q__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) The custom certification creation workflow opens with the following three steps. ## Step 1: Certification details ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1776693176197-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=XXaCnnDGTrdbF1lSFbcmhozNG5~27zkUEgLsEt0Itss-FnMNDSwnSvKGac1phdPIbvdOagEPifhvB~CGO3WKe-kaJg~LW4hZJpaYZxfeg5yWK8jvI1tDPUHBXzywqsjbIvr-4X2aANyawfSf98LH4~ND73v3Y2cquVN8dMTaYGwNCfUdCZ5WzlJyhT1YwPkxFk7L3xtMroeHVgZw~mp8FzbUwu7xIEj6-7rfBFG~nRjovmCDZy~6TL~1AFWqkMy0LCwAl0JfnsxCtSPN2yP96zEIKl8IEPC47aVuYfGs9ThPgKzA~zaxYnCbigFfYUFCV46tvR7jBJGKVGpcacd~Ow__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) 1.  Enter a name for the certification. 2.  Enter a description that explains what the certification covers. 3.  Click **Continue**. ## Step 2: Import HackerRank for Work test 1.  Search and select a test under the **Linked HackerRank for Work test** field. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1776693200334-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=ntvc1E~0gKRvC6v0LhWsb2EpitQyQOZOS-CluVhtCXDqWiDJU-larN3NpS69m7U7JpweOSQ4caK3cP3EhKKqI~xKFeJUqGa7tRk-YrHfZS0fYHB9oaAmqbWtK-1h2KDetbycaqZHwI59-ssItyKT6BIWWaSc7ezQp~IwkeY-mJE2Nmzymcuq0GzKEcZWWmIK9NKRFcxFLKl9cmnh2C9R8gKBdeGq9Bq7k4v3q8yL3g9hpxT5O3e93r-lAOtu3fYV2Mq2xD697GPrJF001OCYU8oFlgDY19NzxqXhXCdOhKdNhp5bQYwXUl2kQGNBxVCnhl9ajrpEXmi3ksee87wX2g__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) **Note**: - You can link only one test to a certification. - You cannot change the linked test after you create the custom certification. 1.  Enter the minimum score required to pass the certification in the **Overall cutoff percentage** field. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1776693219377-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=sDd2A0l17LqAHjx5a73svWvD1gsvRXCpACKhyCSibT4OS48dmYAonZTmtqVMa4D1SsTVPiG~05kib0his0dizWXwr-ztasCV3JgughrEhJUvN-kdPyqJwu5HxRnl-hAw94~wkTy1m9LxOp~KCxTeNmIyUpNbDQJ6J-ACucIgCnWYUlPtlwUgyEmdEslwLOdnPylhulHx9c1le5llTZtL1kzqoGLvHuM4yrCnH8xnM1WJhrGL0LRDGNDg9-oNFk2UzMQ6RogsuWTUFAkpXtWCOhqDwHZUCaapyE1rUhAfpLKwhHYgA~NMKPxNgDJRnZM0k-jB9mJjukg~wg8QFhjTAw__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) 2.  Click **Continue**. ## Step 3: Review ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1776693251738-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=OEShdcEE9NA81QaK6KWSK1LSTJwdc-yZ8Hww0U4QF8d9RqQSCFipWOiBfrMUAGNoJwdMVauMDn~RfW~Kun7kdXFnnpNAjWPEKYuljM~SHHzA7lUck31sEJny9s~bXiFwAqGOmtHbOZihGv1jGUWKq895k7wRAeLPvfubIpcr02nK8X6eOUz10N3seDywSk1vyBWFiMKOa~U1UVzMSVH4HorhrLwUPEjFJxcSNaWpvJ6diA1k8k6N2PnJYTIehNF0AWN7XoeEw2pSwBOkhFGbiaB2fEEdmk0dH0NlgJW4OQM76koCJ9KT~3dAkOcsMvXepx6FsFWztxsYswQspptHVw__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) 1.  Review the certification details, linked test, and cutoff score. 2.  Click **Create custom certification**. 3.  Click **Create custom certification** in the confirmation dialog. A success message appears. \ \

title: Custom Certifications
content: Custom Certifications let you convert any test created in HackerRank for Work into a SkillUp certification experience. These certifications mirror the experience of standard SkillUp assessments, but your team fully owns the content. Standard Certifications may not align with your tech stack or internal standards. With Custom Certifications, you can build assessments that reflect your team’s real-world challenges and complement existing SkillUp content. ![Custom Certification.gif](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1753767345737-CustomCertification.gif?Expires=253370764800&Signature=f-t3HYPu~hGVh1T6YVzwNFPggZSPhPu4U6X4udbtbXwTItE-RybfozAY9jyNgx2Lfoz0a9rUC-HWduAyTdaLooLC0UFVZJT~8wZxEf3jXdCNQOsZ4XGs7ZatqqFwEsoumW~9aoFmlu-k5l7mcnuDqKiSQ-bxqcsiucUbBjgF5sQrhDyuu6f0u23qB66pBvLe~BLoZ9WqUBY7YcCZYAYAJzr~XPxYZe0~Z3s3J8JFmfe3u6phre0FNLCOH9YDBbSuTdS2vjwzsjavr6eDLhFsiLrT4H08y2nwC~IdQw0wzrldqBy3vuS0Ije2TuU8LM7dwtwlEi530HTD0K~UXpxVaQ__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) Companies increasingly build skills-based mobility programs and invest in internal talent development. Whether you prepare junior developers for advancement or reskill engineers in new domains such as cloud, AI, or full-stack development, Certifications help you measure progress with clarity and rigor. ## Intended audience The Custom Certification is designed for: - Engineering leaders or learning and development (L&D) teams who design structured learning and certification paths - Platform owners or HackerRank for Work administrators who manage test content and track outcomes - Developers and employees who participate in internal upskilling or mobility programs - Enterprise customers who build custom skill frameworks and signals alongside SkillUp’s standard certifications ## Best practices To get the most out of Custom Certification: - Use hands-on, real-world problems to measure skills objectively - Pair the certification with a recommended SkillUp Learn track so developers can practice in advance. ## Known limitations - You need support from HackerRank to activate a test for a SkillUp certification. After you prepare the test in HackerRank for Work, contact your account manager or [support@hackerrank.com](mailto:support@hackerrank.com). - Library content restrictions apply. You can only use questions available in your HackerRank library, or you can create custom questions.\ \ \ \

title: Get Started with Certify
content: The Certify experience in SkillUp enables developers to confidently work toward and earn certifications in key roles. It provides a clear, guided path through practical, untimed challenges that build the skills needed for success. ## Intended audience The Certify experience is designed for: - Individual developers who want to demonstrate their capabilities through hands-on certifications. - Organizations that aim to validate internal skill development and promote talent readiness. ## Using Certify To begin using the Certify experience: 1.  Log in to **SkillUp** using your credentials. 2.  Go to the **Certify** tab. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1745153743788-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=Qe8dQsYz5YIRV8OvIzO0DM82sEs7KPWN8lDEoX7SLI0TPrVAwqUkGjlpZetH1-sx60bwO3-Yri4GS-eUzw4S8e5UIn14SGmk82H4JJmfSGVc~VAEmkHwFfB5Y64flNw1RhZtOYHEEiJXvFbd3bMAAKXrOTN5a6cIv0SSZpDFBwxFO-RiJej39CJpZNMXwV0ZDqEaqJygoNam2JamwR7KWpDb1scoDGfxBPJ5K6kMfF8dLHWyVPMVSBQU~j5zP9gl0s-XRqRT8M48k8e7-F-qO8yhAJf5CA8jRqnJhliQK1SApLBV~hSxx0S1S3gljEET23KEtbUNRUxYIm2esZjSsw__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) 3.  Select a role certification track (for example, *Frontend Developer - React*). 4.  Review the list of required practice challenges. 5.  Solve each practice challenge at your own pace. The AI tutor is available for support during practice. 6.  Complete all required practice challenges to unlock the certification assessment. 7.  Attempt the certification when you are ready. **Note:** Certification is a timed assessment conducted on the HackerRank platform. ## Common use cases - A developer preparing to transition into a specialized frontend role, such as Angular development, wants to demonstrate their capabilities. - An employee aiming for internal mobility uses certifications to validate readiness for a new role. - A manager encourages team members to earn certifications that align with organizational skill goals. ## Best practices To get the most out of the Certify experience: - Take your time with practice challenges. Use the AI tutor to fully understand the problems. - Practice in short, consistent sessions instead of completing everything at once. - Use the sample environment to get familiar with the certification test format. - Track your progress to ensure all required practice challenges are completed before attempting certification. ## Known limitations The following limitations apply to the current experience: - The AI tutor is not available during the certification assessment. - Certifications are time-bound and can only be reattempted after a cooldown period. ## FAQs **Can I attempt the certification directly?** No. You must complete the required practice challenges before unlocking the certification. **What happens if I fail the certification?** You can reattempt the certification after the cooldown period ends. **Is the AI tutor available during the certification test?** No. The AI tutor is only available during practice challenges. **Can I download or share my certificate?** Yes. After passing the certification, you can download and share your certificate from your SkillUp profile. \

title: Get Started with Learn
content: The Learn experience in SkillUp offers a structured, flexible, and hands-on learning environment. It helps developers improve their technical skills through guided practice and AI-powered support. It includes the following features: - Self-paced, contextual learning with guided examples and interactive challenges. - Real-time AI tutor to support coding practice and concept reinforcement. - Skill badges that validate proficiency and progress. ## Intended audience The Learn experience is designed for: - Individual developers seeking to upskill in specific technologies. - Organizations aiming to promote talent growth by helping employees gain and demonstrate new skills. ## Using Learn To begin using the Learn experience: 1.  Log in to **SkillUp** using your credentials. 2.  Go to the **Learn** tab. 3.  Select a skill (for example, Python, Angular). 4.  Select a concept from the **Foundational**, **Intermediate**, or **Expert** track. 5.  Read the lesson material with examples, explanations, and guidance from the AI tutor. 6.  Use the built-in AI tutor to ask questions or get help as needed. 7.  Start the associated coding challenge when you are ready. The AI tutor remains available for support. 8.  Submit your completed solution. 9.  Complete all challenges in a track to earn a Skill badge. ## Common use cases - A developer preparing for a new backend role wants to refresh their Python fundamentals. - A backend engineer transitioning to a full stack position uses the React learning path to build frontend skills. - A manager encourages the employee to upskill and earn a badge to demonstrate readiness for an internal opportunity. ## Best practices To get the most out of the Learn experience: - Use the AI tutor to deepen your understanding instead of skipping directly to the challenge. - Set aside short, regular time blocks to complete modules at your own pace. ## Known limitations The following limitations apply to the current experience: - The AI tutor is available only during Learn and Badge experiences. It is not accessible during timed certification assessments. - Badges are skill-specific and currently available only for certain learning paths. ## FAQs **Do I need to complete a badge before taking a certification?** No. Completing a badge is helpful but not a prerequisite for certification **Are challenges timed?** No. Learn and badge-related challenges are untimed. Only certification assessments are timed. **Can I retake a module if I make a mistake?** Yes. You can reattempt modules as needed and take the time required to master the content. **Where can I find my badge after I earn it?** Badges will appear in your **SkillUp profile** upon completion of the Learn track. \

title: HackerRank Role Certifications Guidelines
content: HackerRank's Role Certifications use technical assessments to evaluate a developer’s proficiency in a set of technical skills associated with a specific role (i.e., Front-End Developer, Software Engineer). Role Certifications use HackerRank’s Skills Taxonomy as the basis for determining the specific skills associated with each role. HackerRank Role Certifications provide verification of skills proficiency associated with a specific role, they do not imply a guarantee or endorsement of a developer for employment decisions. ## Role Certifications details - Role Certifications consist of a specific set of skill assessments using valid HackerRank assessments. - Learn more about the process we’ve used to develop valid, fair and reliable HackerRank’s skills assessments [here](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/26279861944979-Manual-for-Fair-Hiring) - HackerRank identifies the skills associated with specific roles based on our Skill Taxonomy. HackerRank can support those who wish to map skills to their own taxonomy through our Professional Services team (additional fees may apply) - HackerRank’s Skill Taxonomy combines internal data, external job description analysis and SME review to develop our comprehensive Roles Directory. This directory is the foundation for identifying the skills assessed in Role Certifications. - Assessments rigorously test developer proficiency in key languages, frameworks, tools and concepts required for a given role - Within the Role Certification assessment, dedicated sections provide assessment questions for important skills. - Passing cut-scores are set by default to a score generated by HackerRank that is based on our benchmarking data. This threshold is an approximation of the 75th percentile score for a sampling of questions assessing the same skill at the same difficulty level. ## Additional insights - HackerRank assessments are developed based on HackerRank’s research and audited for bias to create tests that are valid and fair. If you choose to use custom assessments and want to achieve similar validity evidence, work with your HackerRank I/O Psychologist to create an action plan (additional fees may apply). - Set Clear Internal Standards: - Determine the specific Role Certifications that align with your organization's existing roles. - Clearly define the skills required for each role. - Document and communicate these standards & requirements to all dev managers for consistency and fairness in your assessment process. - Be transparent regarding your expectations with employees. Create clear, consistent communication on how Role Certifications are used at your company. ## Disclaimers - HackerRank Role Certifications provide skills proficiency insights but do not imply a guarantee or endorsement of a developer. Any employment decisions made based on this data is at the sole discretion of the employer organization. - HackerRank Role Certifications may not be available for all developer roles at your organization. HackerRank Roles Directory currently supports 77 roles. SkillUp provides Role Certifications for 19 roles as of March 14, 2024. Work with your HackerRank Customer Account Manager to discuss role certification details and requirements for your company. - HackerRank Role Certifications consist of a specific set of skill assessments, using valid HackerRank assessments. No guarantee is made that HackerRank Assessments will align exactly with your proprietary skills taxonomy and may require modification to match the skills requirements for roles at your organization. - Passing cut-scores are set by default to a score generated by HackerRank that is based on our benchmarking data. This threshold is an approximation of the 75th percentile score for a sampling of questions assessing the same skill at the same difficulty level. - Cut-scores may require adjustments by company based on organizational requirements, employee knowledge levels, and other company-specific differences. - Role Certifications do not holistically evaluate non-technical skills and are set by default to assess technical skills identified by HackerRank’s research. Therefore, other non-technical assessments for employees may be required for a holistic view of candidate skills. - Role Certifications are intended to enhance, not replace, your current learning & development (L&D), and internal mobility practices. **Note:** As you use Role Certifications, please provide ongoing feedback to HackerRank directly with your HackerRank Customer Account Manager.  Your input helps HackerRank continuously improve our solutions and ensure we meet your evolving needs. \

title: HackerRank SkillUp
content: ### Introduction to SkillUp SkillUp is a solution to support internal upskilling and mobility within your organization. It allows individuals to assess their skill proficiency and receive personalized learning plans for developing skills relevant to their current or future roles. Skill development is validated through badges and role certifications, ensuring employees and organizations can track growth. For employers, SkillUp offers a comprehensive view of the skill inventory within the organization, aiding in workforce planning by identifying strengths and skill gaps. ### SkillUp Use Cases SkillUp creates value for employers and employees by providing visibility into your workforce's current and future state, enabling data-driven development. ### For Employers - **Workforce Planning**: Gain insight into your organization’s skills distribution. Use this data to understand workforce strengths and gaps, supporting effective upskilling initiatives. - **Talent Certification**: Accurately certify current skill levels, eliminating assumptions and guesswork. Use this data to make informed decisions about workforce development. - **Learning and Development Tracking**: Monitor the progress and effectiveness of learning programs using comprehensive reporting tools to ensure continuous improvement. - **Internal Mobility**: Identify potential Employees for internal job roles by reviewing verified skill profiles and progress in development. This feature can support career advancement and reduce employee turnover. ### For Developers #### **Upskilling Resources** - **Vast Learning Library:** Access a comprehensive library of learning materials, including courses, tutorials, and hands-on projects. These resources are tailored to enhance your skills across various roles and technologies, helping you upskill and benchmark your proficiency. - **Verified Skill Profiles:** Create and maintain a verified skill profile on **SkillUp**. This profile highlights your proficiencies, achievements, and technical expertise, giving a comprehensive overview of your skills. - **Curated Learning Paths: SkillUp provides customized learning paths b**ased on your current skill level, career goals, and organizational needs. These pathways ensure efficient, targeted skill development aligned with your growth and organizational objectives. By leveraging **SkillUp**, developers can take charge of their skill development, earn credentials, and explore internal mobility opportunities. Employers can make informed decisions about technical talent, drive upskilling initiatives, and ensure a skilled, productive workforce aligned with business objectives. **Related Articles: ** - [SkillUp Employer Platform](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/34700406393747-Accessing-SkillUp-Employer-Platform) - [SkillUP Employee Platform](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/34903825259795-SkillUp-Employee-Platform) - [SkillUp Manager Overview](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/34761067761555-SkillUp-Manager-Experience) - [SkillUp Skills and Roles Overview](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/34867781944339-Skills-Available-in-SkillUp) - [SkillUP Licences](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/27412354898579-HackerRank-SkillUp-Licenses) ## Frequently Asked Questions **How is a proficiency level determined?** Skill Ratings determine the proficiency level. HackerRank determines the cut-offs for each proficiency in a skill-based on inputs from SMEs and how the top 10% of the employees have scored in a particular assessment that determines the skill proficiency. In the case of custom assessments (tailored to meet the organization's requirements), the organizations set the cut-offs. **What if I take multiple assessments that assess the same skill?** The Skill Rating would be based on the results from the most recent assessment taken. This will help us keep the Skill Rating accurate and up-to-date to enable your decision-making process. **How can I access past Skill Ratings?** In the profile of an employee, you can go to the Skill Details section to see the progress of Skill Ratings over a period of time. **How many retakes are allowed for an assessment?** The employer will determine the number of retakes for each assessment based on their policies. The cool-down period is determined as the days to pass before taking the next retake. **What is the difference between Skill Ratings and Badges?** Skill Rating is a quantitative indicator of an individual's proficiency in technical skills. Badges, on the other hand, are a way of acknowledging an achievement or a skill acquisition at a skill proficiency level. You can receive a badge when you have taken an assessment and reached proficiency level. For example, If you take a Java assessment and achieve the required Skill Rating for expert proficiency, you will receive the Java (Expert) ^ badge. **What happens to my skill rating if the assessment is retired or updated?** If an assessment is deleted from HRW, it is considered retired. You will continue to see the assessment scores in the Assessment History, but your Skill Rating will reflect the most recent Rating before the retired assessment. If the content of an assessment changes, it is considered updated. However, your skill rating will not be affected if an assessment is updated. **How can I add custom learning resources to SkillUp?** You must provide an Excel sheet with the links to custom learning resources like Pluralsight videos or Udacity courses. Within two business days, the HackerRank team will manually add these links to the relevant skills. In the future, you can add custom resources through the admin dashboard. **Can I influence the content in certification assessments? ** No, you cannot influence or customize the content in the certification assessments. Hackerrank is taking a strategic bet on AI-first learning and will invest in providing guided, immersive AI tutors for each skill and role. The certification content will be Hackerrank's proprietary AI-powered assessments. **What is the difference between a badge and a certification? ** A badge is earned for demonstrating proficiency in a skill after passing a skill assessment. Certification is earned for a role that combines multiple skills after passing a comprehensive role assessment that includes prerequisites of earning the relevant skill badges. **Can I transfer skill badges earned outside the company (e.g., on the HackerRank community) to my employer's SkillUp account?** You cannot transfer external skill badges into your organization's SkillUp account. SkillUp treats personal community certifications separately from professional employer certifications to maintain data privacy and boundaries. **How often are the global in-demand skills updated on the SkillUp platform?** The global in-demand skills showcased on SkillUp are updated annually based on HackerRank's skills report research. However, the company is exploring increasing the frequency of these updates.

title: HackerRank SkillUp Licenses
content: ## SkillUp SkillUp is a comprehensive platform designed to help organizations manage and develop their technical talent effectively. It offers a range of features and tools to support developers and employers in their growth, workforce planning, and talent mobility efforts. ## Licenses For SkillUp HackerRank SkillUp offers the following user license types: - Platform License - Org License - Individual License Each license type provides access to specified features and functionality within SkillUp. All licenses must be assigned to individual named users within your organization. ## Platform License The Platform License provides access to all the SkillUp features and functionality included with both an Org License and an Individual License. Access to functionality is granted through SkillUp Org and SkillUp Individual licenses. ## Org License The Org License provides users with access to the following features: - View company overview - View company talent directory - Export Individual User details from the talent directory - Assign goals to Individual Users - View the Skill Profile of all individual users - Add users - Export the list of individual users in user management - View and store certification assessments for use in connection with SkillUp - View raw reports on certification assessments Org Licenses are intended for use by Admin, Managers, and Executives. Admin users are granted access to a corresponding Recruiter license in the HackerRank platform to facilitate their use of SkillUp. ## Individual License The Individual License provides users with access to the following features: - Explore the role directory and skills directory - Execute learning plans - Take skill badging assessments and role certification assessments - Download Role Certificates - Manage their Skill Profile Individual Licenses are generally intended for use by individual developers within your organization who will access the skills development features of SkillUp.

title: Manage Users Accessing User Management Adding a new user Edit user details Deactivating a user Reactivating a user
content: The **User Management** section provides access to all users within your organization. You can view, add, and manage user accounts based on assigned roles and permissions. # Accessing User Management To access user management: 1.  Log in to your **HackerRank for Work** account using your credentials. 2.  Click your profile icon in the upper-right corner and select **Admin Panel**. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1760452109066-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=Sbe0OF76QFT0reyeOR5CEKUujVHWgJ0hxpMYP0wbV9hRZ9kn6XP5udyYome~a-T3XXkCzYGML~60iGMpYrHK6OMB-EniXnR0J-Ykmvh2qbDPcZ0YSEd6PHdAXN9DHuN5Ukl3M4f0LJLqGJ4h0TzlR8P6HSU5oBAPGlk6p-R68znnhga2pRNNgiudm-A5e~Jy2UZ9AiMy~CmHYHUE3KegjaRBCKTnnrzeVvrZnDu0ASmfNwBII7HBu5H7FkX0QaHkzXxnorfgp-IRCVKxLOPKsY76VmZN4HJc9ivvyavfbxkg0u8qK~eB8wlZoZpaKam8GE58xq2015XSHlGXE1oJBw__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) The **Admin Panel** interface appears. 3.  Click your profile icon in the admin panel and select **User Management**. 4.  Use the search bar or filters to locate users. ![image.png](https://assets.usepylon.com/e6a58e21-be80-4777-9eaf-f73beeee94d9%2F1760452291658-image.png?Expires=253370764800&Signature=Kl1IKizuJU7dkUQDcZ1ww8rIKm2h9uC6rFafopru7zkT1B9Gd6up1Kl9FhUPUH7H5~j9rkCQjERPvyCaBINrpBZFqkxq34Jz-sjkVL0mErDovcnep6d8qSGpKeeyP8gETdNACpUF5d2UMWBYQV34LyEVg8kVGvKYwJWPwgdlnonJ5vJjzsX6fUS0lXe0bnVaTnPRYbh4AlF1PKC422SPc1~MbkGGRkX5DnvvS6yt3t7APX8GEa9ZcD4REkmbTOjFBi-~wGH7b-JHZ22JkpisJcTzruAYr~n1h8OtSvOWxI7yMDpdOMIoN5PbX-Fq6BCvIQgLztgDzVhlxzD2LXIM6A__&Key-Pair-Id=K3NV4LZ47N8M46) # Adding a new user To add a new user: 1.
